steps.t: Ronald Dwale is at Hob Hillbrow's home at the Bullroarer's Sward in Dwaling. Hob Hillbrow has asked you to retrieve the formal complaint he asked Rona…
Will Tuffin is in the big hole in Dwaling centre. Deliver the formal complaint to Will Tuffin.
Hob Hillbrow is at his home at the Bullroarer's Sward in Dwaling. You should return to Hob Hillbrow and tell him of Will Tuffin's response.
Hob Hillbrow is at his home at the Bullroarer's Sward in Dwaling, south of town centre. You should return to Hob Hillbrow with word of your success an…
